commits.subject: Day 114 (08:48): Fix orphaned-run detection window to reliably close incomplete runs (Task 2)

eval.reason: The diff removes the 20-event tail window and scans the full events file in reverse (stopping at first lifecycle event), exactly matching the task spec. Four unit tests cover distant-orphan detection, no false positives, empty file, and already-closed runs. Build and tests pass.
